story_type_note: Pure tests + documentation story (zero runtime code changes). Coverage is traced by mapping each AC to its evidence artifact (test/doc/build result), not by source-code coverage.

coverage.by_level_note: 8 new integration tests cover AC1-AC5 (unit-level, mock-driven per project rule #27). AC6 is an accepted skip. AC7-AC10 are non-test evidence (docs/build) routed to 'other' coverage level — they cover AC7, AC8, AC9, AC10 but are not themselves tests.

tests.full_suite_note: Full suite established at 5795 tests in dev + code-review steps (baseline 5787 from Story 29.6 + 8 new = 5795). Not re-run during trace per parent pipeline instruction.

accepted_skips.title: E2E test (real environment)
accepted_skips.reason: No CODEANY_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY available in environment. Per Epic 29 'E2E tests are optional' clause and CLAUDE.md 'no mock-based E2E' rule.
accepted_skips.spec_branch: AC6 spec branch (b) — skip with recorded rationale
accepted_skips.mitigation: Cross-feature Task-alias spawn contract is pinned by the 8 mock-based integration tests across AC1-AC5.

recommendations.action: Future cleanup story: address 87 pre-existing DocC warnings (Hummingbird, MCPCore, Stories 29.4-29.6 source-level doc comments). Out of scope per this story's 'no runtime code changes' rule.
When an API key is available, add Sources/E2ETest/SubAgentTaskAliasE2ETests.swift with a single-action Task(subagent_type:prompt:) E2E to close AC6 branch (a) as defense-in-depth.
Maintainer can flip sprint-status.yaml epic-29: in-progress -> done now that this closing story's trace gate is PASS.
